title: Add pilot outcome attribution rollups
summary: Compute and surface direct pilot PnL, cash-relative PnL, replacement value, risk-adjusted replacement value, and pending counterfactual coverage from the append-only pilot competition log.
acceptance_checks: Closed pilot trades with decision_id metadata append decision_outcome records.
Daily run includes pilot_attribution in trend_signals and quant_signals output.
Daily report includes a PILOT SLEEVE ATTRIBUTION section.
Replacement value is marked pending until all frozen counterfactual outcomes are known.
Core strategy entry, exit, ranking, and sizing are unchanged.
tests: python -m pytest quant\test_candidate_competition_logger.py quant\test_pilot_sleeve.py quant\test_universe_manager.py quant\test_universe_adapter.py quant\test_sources.py
follow_up: Build Phase 6 weekly promotion review after enough forward pilot outcomes exist.
